cards.front: What is diagonalization of real symmetric matrices?
cards.back: The process of transforming a real symmetric matrix into a diagonal matrix using an orthogonal matrix
A square matrix of second partial derivatives of a scalar-valued function, used in optimization techniques

cards.front: What is the Method of steepest?
cards.back: An optimization technique that uses the gradient of a function to find the maximum or minimum value of the function

cards.front: What is the classification of quadratic forms based on the eigenvalues of the symmetric matrix?
cards.back: Positive definite, negative definite, indefinite, semi-definite

cards.front: What is orthogonal diagonalization of real symmetric matrices?
cards.back: The process of transforming a real symmetric matrix into a diagonal matrix using an orthonormal matrix
